description.unified: Quickly stabs the enemy, dealing P.DMG. On Crit Hit, applies [Wound] 1 stack and resets the cooldown. This skill’s DMG is increased by 20% per stack of [Wound].

Performs a series of attacks, dealing P.DMG 9 times, then finishes with a powerful thrust that deals P.DMG and knocks the enemy far away. The DMG of this skill is increased by 20% per stack of [Wound], and all stacks are consumed on the final hit.
[Float Like a Butterfly] Increases DMG by {0}% and increases [(added) Armor Penetration by 800] while casting. [(removed) reduces the target's P.Block Chance by 500 for 10 sec].
[Sharp End] Increases ATK Boost by 50% and recovers additional {0} MP upon a Crit Hit for the Skill's duration.
On each Crit Hit, increases own ATK Spd by {0}% and Crit DMG by {1}% for 15 sec. This effect stacks up to 8 times.
